channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping from latest HMO, 24th March
item.description:
New fly tip across the road from previously reported tip. This one comes from our latest HMO in the street as their bins never get emptied because they’re always contaminated and overflowing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tradesperson has dumped door in street, 24th March
item.description:
This has happened in the last 20 minutes as the tradesperson was here unloading new fittings when I went past. You may have cctv?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessisive Litter & Dumping, 24th March
item.description:
This Rookwood Road ia very Busy Through Road Plus we have the Hatzola Station in Rookwood Road,Plus the Bus Station we need far more Road Sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rookwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping - General Waste Bags, 24th March
item.description:
General waste bags left outside 3 The Avenue on grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Sanctuary, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The recycling bins in Walters Yard are full to overflowing and need emptying, 24th March
item.description:
• Please give brief details of your complaint or compliment below: The recycling bins in Walters Yard are full to overflowing and need emptying. I could not see a mechanism for reporting this within FixMyStreet or the waste services pages on the website so am filling in this form to report here. Please can you forward to the appropriate department. • What action (if any) would you like us to take? Request recycling bin providers collect the recycling and empty the bins
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Slip, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pedestrian wait light isn't working on the northwest side, 24th March
item.description:
The pedestrian wait light isn't working on the northwest side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge Freezer fly tipped on the pavement, 24th March
item.description:
The fridge freezer was dumped on the pavement this morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Amberley Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Sweeping & cleaning, 24th March
item.description:
As Rookwood Road is a very Busy Through Road,the road should have alot more Cleaning,as of now its Quite Dirty
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rookwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Salt store behind cycle hangar at top of Burnley Road has been opened and filled with rubbish that is being blown out and down burnley road, 24th March
item.description:
Some is fly tipping household rubbish in the green council salt store. The lid is open and rubbish now blowing down the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-25, Burnley Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Sweeping, 24th March
item.description:
Please note that Overlea Road is very Dirty the Pavements and the Road have not been Swepot Lately and are very Dirty
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Overlea Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Block C door not working, 24th March
item.description:
Block C crayford town hall square DA14FH. Playground entrance 0 floor door out of order. Magnet closure is faulty. Needs a repair. Regards, Julia

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stadium Way, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall on south side of burnley road where it meets Stockwell road, 24th March
item.description:
Graffiti on garden wall of residential property. Not sure how long it has been there. Black and white large letters.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-25, Burnley Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular fly tipping, 24th March
item.description:
Has been happening for the past 4 years and getting progressively worse...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mahon Close, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos on riverbank, 24th March
item.description:
This is the second time I’ve raised this This is asbestos, which is a danger to life. Have it cleared ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandhurst Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scumbags, 24th March
item.description:
Please have all these Wolverham Forest bin bags and all this dead trees cleared from the river Path please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandhurst Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 24th March
item.description:
Is full of debris over time, puddles and floods road when heavy rain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holbrook Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress large box TV box with loads of stuffing another box with a small TV and decorate stuff all in box, 24th March
item.description:
Large TV box keeps falling over and so does the mattress it’s blocking the whole path outside 28 Columbus Square is also a Morrisons trolley dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raleigh Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches Blocking the path, 24th March
item.description:
Branches blocking the path, looks like one of your trees was illegally cut. If was one of TfL trees we’d have got it cleared in under an hour, but I guess we’re just better than you guys :p

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blyth Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism to landscaping, 24th March
item.description:
This section was recently planted but it seems someone has pulled up all the plants already. Looks like vandalism to me.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 24th March
item.description:
Sofa and other flytipped materials outside of 126 Castleton Road. Please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castleton Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
